thread.title: The 40+ best Black Friday PlayStation 5 deals 2024: Deals available now
thread.title_full: The 40+ best Black Friday PlayStation 5 deals 2024: Deals available now

author: Taylor Clemons
title: The 40+ best Black Friday PlayStation 5 deals 2024: Deals available now
text:
Black Friday sales are here, and it's the perfect time to find deals on everything from console preorders and bundles to games and accessories for the PS5 gamer on your holiday shopping list. If you have a gamer on your gift list whose main platform is the PlayStation 5, it's the perfect time to get them the latest games and accessories as well as consoles bundled with digital downloads of popular titles.
Also: The best Black Friday deals live now
While Black Friday and Cyber Monday are two of the biggest shopping days of the year, you can find great PS5 discounts at retailers like Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. You can even find steep discounts on digital downloads of full games, DLC, and in-game cosmetics and currency on the PlayStation Store. To help you check everything off your shopping list without breaking the bank, I've put together a list of the very best deals I could find on PS5 consoles, games, and accessories like controllers and headsets.
Best Black Friday 2024 PlayStation 5 deals
PlayStation 5 Pro Pre-order price guarantee Sony/PlayStation/ZDNET Current price: $700 Amazon has opened up pre-orders on the PlayStation 5 Pro console. And with their pre-order price guarantee, you'll get a refund on your account if the cost goes up between the time you put in your pre-order and when your card is charged. The PlayStation 5 Pro console has 2TB of internal storage and support for 120Hz native refresh rates. View now at Amazon
Samsung 990 Pro 4TB SSD Save $150 at Best Buy Samsung/ZDNET Current price: $330
Original price: $480 The Samsung 990 Pro lets you instantly add 4TB of storage to your PS5, giving you plenty of space for large game downloads, transferring save files, organizing your media library, and backing up your favorite games. View now at Best Buy
Sony InZone H9…
Taylor Clemons
